sections.heading: Academic summary
points: Jeremiah studied at Baptist Bible College in Springfield, Missouri.
He completed a Bachelor of Arts in Interdisciplinary Studies with concentrations in mathematics and computer science.
He also completed a minor in Christian apologetics.

sections.heading: College studies
points: His interdisciplinary studies program combined mathematics, computer science, and humanities coursework.
His academic background supports both technical problem-solving and clear written communication.
His studies included formal work in mathematics, programming, philosophy, and Christian thought.

sections.heading: Leadership and commendations
points: Jeremiah received the Professor's Choice award in the honors program.
He served as student body president while in college.
His academic experience included both leadership responsibilities and strong faculty recognition.
